nasb.text: The sons of Hananiah were Pelatiah and Jeshaiah, the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shecaniah.

esv.text: The sons of Hananiah: Pelatiah and Jeshaiah, his son Rephaiah, his son Arnan, his son Obadiah, his son Shecaniah.

cnv.text: 哈拿尼雅的兒子是毘拉提和耶篩亞；還有利法雅的眾子、亞珥難的眾子、俄巴底亞的眾子和示迦尼的眾子。

ccb.text: 哈拿尼雅的儿子是毗拉提和耶筛亚。耶筛亚生利法雅，利法雅生亚珥南，亚珥南生俄巴底亚，俄巴底亚生示迦尼，
